Service line

PowerShell automation and scripting

We build production-grade PowerShell automation that removes repetitive work without sacrificing supportability, observability, or control.

What we deliver

Automation designed for operations teams

Scripts are not enough. We deliver tested modules and orchestration patterns that can be maintained, reviewed, and operated at enterprise scale.

Identity and access automation modules
Workflow orchestration with approval-aware logic
Operational reporting and evidence pipelines
Service management and remediation scripts
Integration glue between legacy and modern systems
Tested, maintainable modules for enterprise teams
Engineering baseline

Safe, observable, and repeatable

We implement idempotent behavior, strong logging, test coverage where practical, and deployment patterns that avoid one-person knowledge silos.

Engage

Have a manual runbook that should be automation?

Tell us what your team is still doing by hand and we will map a production-grade script strategy.

Talk to us
RePass Cloud

Enterprise software and cloud automation.

Built in Sydney for teams operating across Azure, AWS, and Microsoft 365.
